text:
SRVC_TRKNG_TYPE_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 2 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): IP header 
LT header 
OT header 
RX header 

VALUES: 00 = Not a service tracking claim 
01 = Drug Rebate 
02 = Disproportionate Share Hospital (DSH) Payment 
03 = Lump Sum Payment 
04 = Cost Settlement 
05 = Supplemental 
06 = Other 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: States are to use an encounter record to report services provided under a capitated payment 
arrangement,
